snp2.10:2.0.331: Arouse yourselves, sit up!What good to you is sleeping?For what sleep can there be for the afflicted,for those injured, pierced by the dart? (1) [58]
snp2.10:2.0.332: Arouse yourselves, sit up!Train vigorously for the state of peace.Do not let the King of Death, having caught you heedless,delude you who have come under his control. (2)
snp2.10:2.0.333: Cross over this attachmentby which devas and human beings,full of need, are held fast.Do not let the opportunity pass you by;for those who have missed the opportunitysorrow when they arrive in hell. (3)
snp2.10:2.0.334: Heedlessness is dust always,dust follows upon heedlessness.By heedfulness, by clear knowledge,draw out the dart from oneself. (4)
